sections.paragraph:
Original: כּיּר כּיּור

Transliteration: kı̂yôr kı̂yôr

Phonetic: kee-yore'

BDB Definition:

  1. pot, basin, laver, pan
    1. pot, caldron
    2. fire-pot, brazier
    3. basin, laver
    4. platform, stage

Origin: from the same as H3564

TWOT entry: 967d

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
